summary: P0 ASX Sector Heatmap Panel successfully implemented and tested. Backend API returns correct history_5d data, frontend displays 5 tickers with prices, changes, and color-coded sparklines at bottom of screen. Feature works perfectly with no regression in existing functionality. Pre-existing Globe click issue remains unresolved.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTML instead of JSON API response
minor_bugs.impact: Root endpoint serves frontend instead of API metadata, but all /api/* endpoints work correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Globe click interactions still not working despite visible markers
ui_bugs.description: Globe renders correctly with event markers, but clicking doesn't trigger simulation. This is a pre-existing issue not related to P0 heatmap feature.

passed_tests: ✅ P0 Feature: ASX Sector Heatmap renders at bottom with 120px height
✅ Backend: GET /api/data/asx-prices returns history_5d array with 5 data points
✅ Frontend: SectorHeatmap displays 5 equal columns (BHP, RIO, FMG, CBA, LYC)
✅ Frontend: Each cell shows price, daily change ($ and %), color-coded correctly
✅ Frontend: Sparklines render as SVG polylines (green uptrend/red downtrend)
✅ Frontend: Fixed positioning at bottom, responsive to window size
✅ No regression: Globe, sidebar, simulation flow intact
✅ All 5 tickers display correct mock data (BHP: $49.82 +2.31%, etc.)
✅ Color coding working: All positive changes show green
✅ SVG sparklines with proper stroke colors (#00ff88 for uptrends)
✅ Responsive behavior: Adapts to tablet view correctly
✅ History 5D data validation: All tickers have 5 valid data points
✅ Backend API structure: status=success, data array, cache_ttl present
action_item_for_main_agent: P0 ASX Sector Heatmap Panel is complete and working perfectly. The only remaining issue is the pre-existing Globe click functionality from iteration 3 - Globe markers are visible but click handler isn't firing. This doesn't affect the new heatmap feature.

success_percentage.backend: 85% (6/7 tests passed - minor root endpoint issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (P0 feature 100% working, pre-existing Globe click issue)
